task_completion.description: Verify that Type 2 diabetes mellitus (E11), Essential hypertension (I10), and Dyslipidemia (E78) are documented as active conditions for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Diseases' or 'Conditions' tab/section in Bonifacio Caput's patient record showing the codes E11, I10, and E78 (or their corresponding text descriptions) added to his list of active conditions.

task_completion.description: Verify that a pharmacotherapy regimen consisting of Metformin, an antihypertensive (ACEi/ARB/CCB), and a Statin is prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Medications' or 'Prescriptions' tab/screen showing at least three new drug entries: Metformin, an antihypertensive (e.g., Enalapril, Losartan, Amlodipine), and a Statin (e.g., Atorvastatin, Simvastatin).

task_completion.description: Verify that a metabolic monitoring lab panel with at least three tests is ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Lab Tests' or 'Investigations' screen showing a new lab order for Bonifacio Caput containing at least 3 distinct tests (e.g., HbA1c, Lipid panel, BMP, Glucose, etc.).

task_completion.description: Verify that a dietary/exercise counseling session is recorded in the patient's lifestyle record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Lifestyle', 'Evaluations', or 'Notes' tab showing text entries or checked boxes indicating that dietary and exercise counseling was provided.

task_completion.description: Verify that a follow-up appointment is scheduled in 60 to 120 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Appointments' screen showing a scheduled appointment for Bonifacio Caput with a date that is approximately 2 to 4 months (60-120 days) after the current system date.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GNU Health GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client interface being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing direct database queries (e.g., psql).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the appropriate specific fields within GNU Health (e.g., separate rows for each diagnosis, medication, and lab test), not just typed into a single generic text box or external text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy-paste the task description to bypass proper data entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the fields should correspond to the specific data required (e.g., drug names, ICD-10 codes) rather than a verbatim paste of the prompt's instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Bonifacio Caput. Required Diagnoses: E11 (Type 2 diabetes mellitus), I10 (Essential hypertension), and E78 (Disorders of lipoprotein metabolism). Required Prescriptions: Must include a drug from the 'Metformin' class, 'Antihypertensive' class (e.g., Enalapril, Losartan, Amlodipine), and 'Statin' class. Lab Orders: Minimum of 3 new lab tests required. Follow-up Appointment: Must be scheduled between 60 and 120 days from the current date. Note: The patient's occupation as a 'factory maintenance worker' is not recorded in the database and should not be expected in the UI.
